name: Blocker Marbles (Hazard Slots)
description: Blocker is now a modifier on any box type. Blocker boxes spawn yellow/black hazard marbles that only land on dedicated striped belt slots. Fill all hazard slots to clear them and free up belt space.
howToPlay: Tap boxes to release marbles into the funnel. Regular marbles land on normal belt slots and sort into columns as usual. Yellow/black striped marbles from blocker boxes can ONLY land on the matching hazard slots on the belt. Once all hazard slots are filled, they open up — the blocker marbles drop away and those slots convert to regular belt slots, giving you more room. Sort all regular marbles to win!
author: Claude
